summary: Fix in crates/cclab-jet/src/pkg_manager/resolver.rs (1 file, +134/-0 lines): (1) normalize_npm_range() extended to detect and expand npm hyphen ranges before standard processing — calls expand_hyphen_range() as the first step; (2) expand_hyphen_range() new private function — converts `X - Y` syntax to comma-separated semver comparators per npm spec: major-only Y gives `<(Y+1).0.0`, major.minor Y gives `<Y.(m+1).0`, fully-specified Y gives `<=Y.m.p`; (3) is_version_token() helper — validates that a side of the hyphen range is composed only of digits and dots, rejecting operators, letters, and pre-release tags; (4) 5 unit tests added: test_hyphen_range_major_only, test_hyphen_range_major_minor, test_hyphen_range_fully_specified, test_expand_hyphen_range_rejects_non_hyphen (4 cases), test_normalize_npm_range_space_to_comma.
